| Mnemònic | Operands | Descripció | Nom | Format | Observacions |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| `lw` | `rd, offset(rs1)` | rd = Mw[rs1 + SignExt(offset)] | load word | I |  |
| `lh` | `rd, offset(rs1)` | rd = SignExt(Mh[rs1 + SignExt(offset)]) | load half | I | Estén signe |
| `lhu` | `rd, offset(rs1)` | rd = ZeroExt(Mh[rs1 + SignExt(offset)]) | load half | I | Estén zeros |
| `lb` | `rd, offset(rs1)` | rd = SignExt(Mb[rs1 + SignExt(offset)]) | load byte | I | Estén signe |
| `lbu` | `rd, offset(rs1)` | rd = ZeroExt(Mb[rs1 + SignExt(offset)]) | load byte | I | Estén zeros |
| `sw` | `rs2, offset(rs1)` | Mw[rs1 + SignExt(offset)] = rs2 | store word | S |  |
| `sh` | `rs2, offset(rs1)` | Mh[rs1 + SignExt(offset)] = rs2_{15..0} | store half | S |  |
| `sb` | `rs2, offset(rs1)` | Mb[rs1 + SignExt(offset)] = rs2_{7..0} | store byte | S |  |
: {tbl-colwidths="[5,20,40,15,5,15]"}
